meaning: adj.造成城形的,构造如城的,有城的
examples: This paper presents a manufacture method for castellated beam.
The effect of flanges restraint on the web in castellated beams under uniform moment is analyzed.
This paper introduces the experiment made on the castellated beam purlins installed on the roof of me formed steel sheetings.
Imagine the cost of restoring hundreds of rotted oak beams and replacing stonework on castellated walls four feet thick.
More than 200km north of Lake Louise in Jasper National Park, it has a very different look to its castellated siblings.
